certificate.issuing_authority: GridLedger IP Ltd — Risk & Verification Committee

node.description: Agricultural mill operations, Malawi. Reference node for Glass Box certification methodology.

qualification_criteria.proof_point_integrity: NABIWI maintained ≥90% adherence and zero gap-breach detection across 62 consecutive daily cycles, establishing the institutional proof of controllable operational discipline.

replay_verification.methodology: Deterministic SQL query against cycle table per NODE_QUALIFICATION_STANDARD_V1_0 Section 4
replay_verification.audit_trail: Can be replayed at any future date using identical SQL query and cycle table state

certificate_hash.input_data: GBC-NABIWI-2026-05-08 | consecutive_cycles:62 | window_start:2025-04-02 | window_end:2025-08-21 | adherence:93.5 | gap_breaches:0
certificate_hash.purpose: Immutable reference for this certification event. Hash confirms that no material certificate data has been modified post-issuance.

primary_conditions: If any cycle in window [2025-04-02, 2025-08-21] is retroactively changed to status='FAILED' or status='INTERRUPTED'
If gap_breach_detected is set to 1 for any cycle in the qualifying window
If a new cycle is inserted within the qualifying window with adherence < 90%
If audit_summary for any cycle in the window indicates manual override or reconciliation exception
secondary_conditions: If cycle table schema changes invalidate the replay query (e.g., column deletion)
If operational governance audit detects systematic data fraud or manipulation
invalidation_logic.invalidation_notification: Automatic database trigger + written notice to node operator and risk desk
invalidation_logic.evidence_log: Invalidation events recorded in invalidation_event table per NODE_QUALIFICATION_STANDARD_V1_0 Section 4.2

renewal_conditions.continuous_qualification_requirement: After issuance, qualification remains active if at least one additional clean cycle (status='SEALED'/'VERIFIED', gap_breach_detected=0, adherence≥90%) is recorded every 30 days
renewal_conditions.renewal_monitoring: Automated daily check; alert triggered if 30+ days pass without qualifying cycle

renewal_pathway.scenario_1: Clean cycles accumulate naturally; qualification auto-renews
renewal_pathway.scenario_2: 30+ day gap detected; status changes to 'Glass_Box_Inactive_Pending_Reinstatement'
renewal_pathway.scenario_3: New 62-cycle consecutive clean run required to reinstate if gap > 60 days

renewal_conditions.expiration_policy: Glass Box certification does not expire; it becomes inactive if operational discipline lapses, and can be reinstated with fresh consecutive run

glass_box_unlocks: Revenue-based credit lines: up to 85% of 30-day average remittance (NABIWI: ~1.96M MK availability)
Price floor guarantees: operator protected against tariff collapse
Working capital facilities: short-term liquidity tied to cycle settlement
Capital market securitization: institutional-grade cashflow for tranche funding
capital_decision_applicability.risk_desk_authority: This certificate is sufficient for risk desk approval of Glass Box instruments without additional forensic review. Forensic path is available for enhanced institutional credibility but not required.
capital_decision_applicability.pricing_anchor_reference: NABIWI_PRICING_DOCTRINE_V1_0 Section 5 (verified March 2026 cashflow: 30.86k MK/cycle average, variance coefficient 37.6%)

constitutional_precedent.significance: This certificate establishes the institutional format, terminology, invalidation logic, and renewal structure that will be cited by all subsequent node qualifications (Glass Box and all other pathways).
constitutional_precedent.citation_format: Future certificates shall reference: 'Established per Glass Box Certificate Template (NABIWI, May 2026), consistent with NODE_QUALIFICATION_STANDARD_V1_0'
constitutional_precedent.amendment_protection: No modifications to this certificate are permitted after issuance. If standard changes require certificate updates, a new certificate is issued with amended date and reference to amendment document.
constitutional_precedent.archival_status: This certificate is the constitutional anchor. It will be cited in every subsequent GridLedger certification governance document for the next 5+ years.

institutional_metadata.certificate_lineage: NABIWI Glass Box is the first institutional-grade certificate issued under NODE_QUALIFICATION_STANDARD_V1_0. All future certificates shall follow this template format.
institutional_metadata.replay_audit_required: Annual audit of Glass Box qualification requires running the Glass Box Replay Query (Section 2.2) against current cycle table and verifying that consecutive_clean_cycles ≥ 62 still holds.
institutional_metadata.version_control: This is Template v1.0. Future amendments (e.g., if renewal logic changes) will be versioned as v1.1, v1.2, etc., but this specific NABIWI certificate remains v1.0 immutable.
institutional_metadata.binding_document: This certificate is a binding institutional record. It may be presented to lenders, DFIs, capital markets, or regulatory bodies as definitive evidence of NABIWI's operational qualification. Any challenge to this certificate must be filed with the GridLedger Risk & Verification Committee within 30 days of issuance.

public_reference.short_form: NABIWI Glass Box Certificate | Issued 2026-05-08 | Consecutive clean cycles: 62 | Valid
public_reference.long_form: GridLedger NABIWI Glass Box Certification establishes institutional confidence that NABIWI mill operations maintain controllable operational discipline sufficient for capital market instruments up to 85% LTV against verified remittance. Valid from 2026-05-08 pending continuous renewal conditions. Reference: NODE_QUALIFICATION_STANDARD_V1_0.
